one_line: Completed the full 750-episode ablation (5 cond x 30 inc x 5 seeds) with cheaper model deepseek-v4-pro, 0 errors in 2710s: rex pass@1=0.893 vs zero_shot 0.240, beats best_of_n/retry/no_oracle (McNemar p<0.0001), with the honest finding that rex_no_oracle~=best_of_n so the lift is the oracle feedback not the tree.
